title: VROOM
summary: Self-hosted vehicle cost tracker — fuel, maintenance, financing, insurance, analytics.
description: A full vehicle cost-of-ownership tracker: fuel economy, maintenance schedules, financing/lease math, insurance terms, and a TCO analytics engine. Offline-first with conflict-resolving sync, a money-as-integer-cents data model, multi-vehicle sharing, and import from Fuelly/Fuelio/Drivvo. 1700+ backend tests.

title: ryang.dev
summary: This site — a self-hosted Astro portfolio with a 15-theme engine.
description: The site you're on. Astro SSR on Bun, Pocketbase backend, a 15-theme CSS-variable engine with a Konami-code unlock, a shared-password recruiter gate, dynamic OG share cards, and a 9-container self-hosted companion stack — all behind my own router's Caddy.

title: Homelab
summary: Self-hosted services on Docker behind a single reverse proxy.
description: The infrastructure everything else runs on: a Docker host with Caddy terminating TLS at the router, privacy-first analytics, self-hosted coding stats, status monitoring, and automated backups. Reproducible via docker compose.
